name.description: Name of content state. Maximum 20 characters.

color.description:
Color of state. Must be in 6 digit hex form (#FFFFFF). The default colors offered in the UI are:
 #ff7452 (red),
 #2684ff (blue),
 #ffc400 (yellow),
 #57d9a3 (green), and
 #8777d9 (purple)

id.description: id of state. This can be 0,1, or 2 if you wish to specify a default space state.
